dimensions.name: Project Initiation
dimensions.recommendation: Establish a standardized initiation checklist that includes mandatory charter sign-off, PM assignment verification, and budget validation before any planning begins.

dimensions.name: Planning & Estimation
dimensions.recommendation: Implement bottom-up estimation as standard practice. Require scope baseline sign-off before schedule development. Add estimation accuracy tracking across projects.

dimensions.name: Risk Management
dimensions.recommendation: Critical gap: No active risk management exists. Establish a risk review cadence (minimum bi-weekly), assign risk owners, and track closure rates. Zero risks closed is a systemic failure.

dimensions.name: Quality & Governance
dimensions.recommendation: Critical gap: No governance mechanisms exist. Establish a steering committee with decision rights, implement gate reviews with objective criteria, and create a change control board.

dimensions.name: Knowledge Management
dimensions.recommendation: Critical gap: No organizational learning mechanism. Implement post-phase retrospectives, create a searchable lessons-learned database, and mandate knowledge transfer in project handoffs.

dimensions.name: Process Standardization
dimensions.recommendation: Some processes are followed but not consistently. Document the PM methodology, create templates for key artifacts, and establish process compliance reviews.

dimensions.name: Stakeholder Management
dimensions.recommendation: Stakeholders are identified but not actively managed. Implement a communication cadence, establish success criteria alignment workshops, and create an escalation protocol.
